name: Resist and Update: Counterfactual Report Coordinates for Incentive-Compatible LLMs
summary: arXiv:2607.12985v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Aligned language models routinely misreport under non-evidential incentive pressure: they agree with a confident user or overstate certainty even whe...
description: arXiv:2607.12985v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Aligned language models routinely misreport under non-evidential incentive pressure: they agree with a confident user or overstate certainty even when their internal belief is unchanged. We cast this as a failure of internal incentive-compatibility (IC) and present a method for learning and certifying counterfactual report mediators that hold a mo...
author: Sen Yang, Yuen-Hei Yeung
